posts.title: The Human Readback Gate for Prompt Rollouts
posts.summary: Metrics can miss awkward confidence, subtle tone drift, and misleading framing. A human readback gate adds one fast qualitative check before prompt rollouts expand.

posts.title: Prompt Change Journal: Why Agent Teams Need More Than Git Diffs
posts.summary: A prompt change journal records intent, expected effect, and observed impact so teams can debug regressions faster in agentic workflows.
